subject: System and method for secure transitory data storage and management (US 11,665,282 B2)

dialog.body: Secure storage and management of transitory data using a profile manager, callback manager, context analysis engine, and vault manager; lets a user create an encrypted data container for storing preferences with managed access controls.

meta.notes: Priority 2009-01-28, filed 2022-05-18, granted and published 2023-05-30. Assignee: Virtual Hold Technology Solutions, LLC. Shares priority chain with US 2021/0321002 A1 and US 2023/0073930 A1.
